Table of Contents

Class PagoService

Namespace
BLL.Services
Assembly
BLL.dll

Business logic service for payment registration, refunds, and receipt management.

public class PagoService
Inheritance
object
PagoService
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)

object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

All write operations run inside IUnitOfWork transactions. Receipt (comprobante) generation is non-fatal: failures are logged but do not abort the payment.

Payment types are determined by the presence of MembresiaID or ReservaID; otherwise the payment is treated as a generic account credit.

Constructors

PagoService()

Initializes all dependencies from DalFactory singletons.

public PagoService()

Methods

AdjuntarComprobante(Guid, ComprobanteDTO)

Attaches a receipt file to an existing payment.

public void AdjuntarComprobante(Guid pagoId, ComprobanteDTO dto)

Parameters

pagoId Guid

The payment to attach the receipt to.

dto ComprobanteDTO

Receipt metadata and content.

ListarPagos(Guid?, DateTime?, DateTime?)

Returns payments filtered by client and optional date range. When clienteId is null, returns all payments filtered by date only.

public List<PagoDTO> ListarPagos(Guid? clienteId, DateTime? desde, DateTime? hasta)

Parameters

clienteId Guid?

Optional client filter.

desde DateTime?

Optional inclusive lower bound on payment date.

hasta DateTime?

Optional inclusive upper bound on payment date.

Returns

List<PagoDTO>

ObtenerComprobante(Guid)

Retrieves the receipt attached to a payment.

public ComprobanteDTO ObtenerComprobante(Guid pagoId)

Parameters

pagoId Guid

The payment identifier.

Returns

ComprobanteDTO

The ComprobanteDTO, or null if not found.

ObtenerPagosPorReserva(Guid)

Retrieves all payments linked to a specific reservation.

public List<PagoDTO> ObtenerPagosPorReserva(Guid reservaId)

Parameters

reservaId Guid

The reservation to query.

Returns

List<PagoDTO>

ReembolsarPago(Guid)

Refunds a payment: transitions its status from Abonado to Reembolsado and inserts a negative Reembolso movement.

public void ReembolsarPago(Guid pagoId)

Parameters

pagoId Guid

The payment to refund.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when the payment does not exist or its status is not Abonado.

RegistrarPago(PagoDTO)

Registers a payment, updates the corresponding membership next-payment date (if applicable), auto-transitions the reservation to Pagada when fully settled, and generates a receipt.

public void RegistrarPago(PagoDTO dto)

Parameters

dto PagoDTO

Payment data. Monto must be positive.

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown for invalid amount or missing payment method.

InvalidOperationException

Thrown with code "ERR_MONTO_SUPERA_SALDO" when the payment amount exceeds the reservation's outstanding balance.
